Import your old v8 HTML

This new dashboard cannot open a file:///C:/... path by itself. But it can read your old HTML if you select it from your laptop. It will extract SOLAR_DATA, EXT_OM_DATA, and ACQ_DATA automatically.

📁
Select decentral_portfolio_v8_7.html

HTML, HTM, or TXT renamed HTML accepted.
